title: Miso Marinated Uruguayan Udon Noodles
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of Uruguay with this funky and silky udon noodle dish, featuring a miso marinate and ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients, served on a vibrant talavera plate.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the udon noodles according to the package instructions.
In a blender or food processor, combine miso paste, soy sauce, olive oil, garlic, and ginger, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the miso marinate, sesame seeds, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked udon noodles to the bowl and toss to coat with the miso marinate.
Let the noodles marinate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, sprinkle the chopped scallions over the noodles.
Serve the noodles on a talavera plate and garnish with additional sesame seeds and scallions if desired.
Drizzle with any remaining miso marinate and serve immediately.
